'''fashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickel|nickel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickel|nickel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fashaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæshækæth|fæshækæth]] || [[word:fæshækæj|fæshækæj]] || [[word:fæshækæsh|fæshækæsh]] || [[word:fæshækæ|fæshækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashashakath|fashashakath]] || [[word:fashashakaj|fashashakaj]] || [[word:fashashakash|fashashakash]] || [[word:fashashaka|fashashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashakath|fashakath]] || [[word:fashakaj|fashakaj]] || [[word:fashakash|fashakash]] || [[word:fashaka|fashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashafkafth|fashafkafth]] || [[word:fashafkafj|fashafkafj]] || [[word:fashafkafsh|fashafkafsh]] || [[word:fashafkaf|fashafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashakatha|fashakatha]] || [[word:fashakaja|fashakaja]] || [[word:fashakasha|fashakasha]] || [[word:fashakaka|fashakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashakath|fashakath]] || [[word:fashakaj|fashakaj]] || [[word:fashakash|fashakash]] || [[word:fashaka|fashaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashakathal|fashakathal]] || [[word:fashakajal|fashakajal]] || [[word:fashakashal|fashakashal]] || [[word:fashakakal|fashakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashakaathatha|fashakaathatha]] || [[word:fashakaajaja|fashakaajaja]] || [[word:fashakaashasha|fashakaashasha]] || [[word:fashakaaka|fashakaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashakathan|fashakathan]] || [[word:fashakajan|fashakajan]] || [[word:fashakashan|fashakashan]] || [[word:fashakakan|fashakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashakathaoro|fashakathaoro]] || [[word:fashakajaoro|fashakajaoro]] || [[word:fashakashaoro|fashakashaoro]] || [[word:fashakakaoro|fashakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
